home.aboutParagraph: I'm a full-stack developer passionate about big data, artificial intelligence, and building meaningful tools. From real-time data pipelines to AI-driven applications, I enjoy transforming complex problems into elegant solutions. HOU Universe is my digital playground — a place to showcase projects, document my learning journey, and share what I've built and discovered along the way.
home.contactPrompt: Whether you have a project idea, collaboration opportunity, or just want to chat about tech — I'm always open to connecting with fellow builders and creators.

p1.title: Million-Scale E-Commerce User Behavior Analysis & Visualization System
p1.desc: Based on massive user behavior logs, developed with Claude Code assistance applying Harness engineering principles to build a full-pipeline analysis system from data ingestion to strategic output. Designed a six-step ETL cleansing pipeline, built RFM scoring models with K-Means clustering for user segmentation, and delivered visual dashboards with actionable operational recommendations.

p2.title: Java I/O Stream Performance Testing & Analysis System
p2.desc: Designed an automated performance testing framework comparing various I/O approaches across multiple file sizes. Conducted 15 comparative experiments with quantitative analysis to derive I/O selection strategies for different scenarios, providing data-driven guidance for practical development.

p3.title: Industry-Academia Collaborative Projects (Health Tech / High-Tech Agriculture)
p3.desc: Participated in requirements research and field investigations, assisted in building detection datasets with 300+ image annotations. Reviewed industry literature, assisted in model testing runs, compiled statistical reports, and completed technical documentation and phased report archiving.

p4.title: MySQL-Based Warehouse Management System
p4.desc: Designed for small-to-medium warehousing scenarios, created four core data tables with foreign key relationships. Developed four major management modules — warehouse, goods, inventory, and inbound/outbound — using transaction mechanisms to ensure data consistency across multi-warehouse transfers.

aiSkills: Proficient in AI Agent development tools such as Claude Code and Trae Work, building multi-agent collaborative programming workflows
Mastery of Harness engineering principles, driving AI through high-quality prompts for code generation, debugging, and refactoring to boost development efficiency
Skilled at decomposing complex projects into standardized engineering processes, achieving module decoupling and environment-independent deployment

ca1.title: Student Union Arts & Culture Department · Head
ca1.desc: Coordinated the entire process of a joint two-college singing competition, responsible for contestant screening, judge invitations, and on-site task assignments. Led 4 'After-Class Song' special events. Established a class information dissemination mechanism ensuring full notification coverage.

t2.desc: Systematically learned Java and C core syntax, mastering object-oriented programming concepts, collection frameworks, exception handling, and pointer operations, laying a solid foundation for subsequent system-level development.

t3.desc: Deep-dived into the Python ecosystem, from basic syntax to the data analysis trio (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib), experiencing Python's powerful capabilities in data science and automation.

t5.title: Big Data Technology Stack Introduction
t5.desc: Systematically explored Hadoop, Spark, Hive, and other big data ecosystem components, understanding distributed computing principles, and beginning to process terabyte-level data to extract valuable insights.

hou-universe.title: HOU Universe
hou-universe.description: A personal technical portfolio website with a cosmic theme — built from scratch with modern web technologies to create a personal brand showcase space.
hou-universe.fullDescription: HOU Universe is my personal technical portfolio website, creating a personal brand showcase space with a cosmic theme. The platform is built on Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript strict mode, blending Tailwind CSS with glassmorphism design language to create a unified visual system of deep black + cool white + light blue accents. From starfield particle backgrounds to mouse glow interactions, from typewriter animations to scroll-driven parallax effects, every detail pursues excellence. The platform covers project showcases, skill visualization, guestbook & contact, bilingual support (zh-CN/en), and visitor statistics, all with full responsive adaptation.
hou-universe.background: As a personal developer, I needed a platform to centrally showcase technical capabilities, project outcomes, and learning journey. HOU Universe was born — it is not only a portfolio website but also a showcase space for my personal technical brand. With a deep-space cosmic visual theme, the entire development process was driven by AI-engineering workflows, compressing weeks of traditional work into days while maintaining high code standards and user experience.
coreFeatures: Project portfolio: curated project cards with cover images, tech tags, and download buttons; detail pages with complete technical solutions and update log timelines
Skill visualization: tiered progress bars displaying four skill categories (Programming Languages / Databases / Core Competencies / AI Engineering), with scroll-triggered percentage growth animations
Guestbook & contact: Netlify Forms integrated guestbook wall and contact form, supporting file attachment uploads with automatic email notifications
Bilingual support: complete i18n solution based on i18next covering all site text content in zh-CN and en
Visitor statistics: real-time visitor counter and page view tracking with persistent data storage
Deep space theme: three-layer parallax starfield, 3D planet model, mouse glow tracking, glassmorphism design language, fully responsive
hou-universe.techSolution: The frontend is built on Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript strict mode for type safety. Styling uses Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (Base UI) component system with CSS custom properties for unified dark theme tokens. Framer Motion manages page transitions, scroll-triggered entries, and interaction feedback. Canvas API powers the high-performance starfield particle system, while Three.js (React Three Fiber) drives the 3D planet element. Internationalization is based on i18next + react-i18next supporting zh-CN / en. The build outputs a fully static site (output: export), deployed on Netlify with AI-engineering workflows (Claude Code + Harness methodology) driving the entire development process.
highlights: Deep space cosmic theme: three-layer parallax starfield, 3D planet model, mouse particle gravity interaction, and click starburst effects for an immersive cosmic experience
3D interactive elements: Three.js (R3F) powered hero 3D planet, Canvas high-performance particle system, automatic animation degradation on touch devices
Glassmorphism design language: unified glass-card style across the site with backdrop-blur frosted glass effects and brand-colored micro-glow borders
Full responsive adaptation: perfect mobile/tablet/desktop adaptation, all interactive animations based on Framer Motion delivering smooth 60fps performance

shuatiapp-pro-max.title: Code Practice PRO MAX
shuatiapp-pro-max.description: An online coding practice platform for programming learners, solving the pain points of difficult bulk question import and inefficient mistake review — supporting dual-mode import via text paste and file upload.
shuatiapp-pro-max.fullDescription: Code Practice PRO MAX is an online coding practice platform for programming learners, focused on solving the pain points of difficult bulk question import and inefficient mistake review. It supports dual-mode bulk import via text paste and file upload, with intelligent format recognition that automatically parses questions, options, and answers. The mistake notebook auto-collects wrong answers, favorites allow easy review of key questions, and the targeted practice module supports category-specific training. Answer timing and accuracy statistics help students track learning progress in real-time, while the data analytics dashboard visually presents practice trends. The frontend is built with vanilla JavaScript, backend based on Node.js + Express, with MySQL storing question banks and user data.
shuatiapp-pro-max.background: In programming learning, practice is the core means of reinforcing knowledge, but traditional approaches suffer from scattered question sources, inconvenient mistake management, and difficulty tracking learning progress. Code Practice PRO MAX was created to address these pain points, providing a one-stop practice experience from question import to data analysis, solving the core problems of difficult bulk import and inefficient mistake review.
coreFeatures: Dual-mode bulk import: supports text paste and file upload (CSV/JSON), with intelligent format recognition automatically parsing questions, options, and correct answers, significantly reducing entry costs
Auto mistake collection: wrong answers automatically added to the mistake notebook, supporting category filtering and date sorting for targeted review of weak areas
Favorites module: manually bookmark key question types and high-frequency exam topics, quickly review core questions, avoiding information overload
Targeted practice: category-specific training by data structures, algorithms, databases, etc., with flexible selection of practice scope and question volume
Answer timing system: automatic per-question timing recording response duration, helping develop time management awareness and exam pacing
Accuracy & data statistics: accuracy trends, category mastery radar charts, daily practice volume bar charts, visually presenting learning progress
shuatiapp-pro-max.techSolution: The frontend is built with vanilla JavaScript + HTML5 + CSS3 without heavy frameworks, ensuring loading speed and compatibility. The backend is based on Node.js + Express framework providing RESTful API interfaces, with a frontend-backend separated architecture and form validation ensuring data integrity. MySQL database stores question banks, user data, and learning records with data persistence. The intelligent format recognition module uses regex + rule engine to parse multiple question formats (plain text, CSV, JSON), automatically mapping to standard data structures. Answer timing is based on frontend timestamp recording, while accuracy statistics are computed in real-time via SQL aggregate queries. The overall architecture is lightweight and modular for easy future extension.
highlights: Dual-mode import reduces entry cost: text paste + file upload dual channels, intelligent format recognition with >95% accuracy covering mainstream practice platform export formats
Three-dimensional practice loop: auto mistake collection + key question favorites + category-specific training, building a complete practice feedback loop across three dimensions
Data visualization for progress tracking: accuracy trends, category mastery, and practice volume trends — three chart types helping students precisely identify weak areas
Modular extensible architecture: frontend static resource caching ensures offline usability; mistake notebook, favorites, and targeted practice modules are independently decoupled

changes: First version launched, supporting dual-mode bulk question import via text paste and file upload
Built-in mistake notebook, favorites, and targeted practice learning modules
Implemented answer timing, accuracy statistics, and data analytics dashboard
